Frame generation increases displayed FPS
but does not double your real render throughput.
Latency depends mostly on base FPS.
Example:60 real FPS + frame gen → 120 displayed FPS
Input latency still behaves closer to 60 FPS
That’s why:
Competitive multiplayer players avoid frame gen
It’s best for cinematic single-player 
So calling it “basically a single-player feature” is a reasonable opinion in competitive contexts.
That’s a valid technical stance.
